---
include-in-header:
  text: |
    \newcommand{\mytitle}{High Returns, Low Investment: \\ Public Capital and the Euler Equation Puzzle}
format:
  aea-pdf:
    keep-tex: false  
    journal:
      blinded: false
    indent: true
    citecolor: red
    linkcolor: red
    urlcolor: red
  aea-html: default
title-footnote: |
  Some footnotes on the title...
author-format: horizontal
author:
  - name: "\\LARGE Yichu Li"
    acknowledgements: | 
      The London School of Economics and Political Science. [y.li395@lse.ac.uk](mailto:y.li395@lse.ac.uk).
date: last-modified
articleurl: https://tsssssssshark.github.io/euler-collective-action/output/main.pdf
abstract: |
  The text of your abstract.
keywords:
  - Euler Equation, Collective Action, Public Investment, Tax
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Introduction {#sec-intro}

I will show some examples of things you can easily do in quarto-format.Results

## An Euler Equation Model with Public Capital Externalities {#sec-model}

I build on the inter-temporal optimisation framework of @kremer2019

## Conclusion {#sec-conc}

## References {.unnumbered}

\newpage

## Appendix {.supplementary}

### Appendix A: Data {.unnumbered}

### Appendix B {.unnumbered}

## Supplementary {.supplementary}
